_comment: PCI subsystem vendor codes (4-hex uppercase). Used by profile.ps1 to map a device's SUBSYS_XXXXYYYY (last 4 hex = vendor) to an OEM name. When the subsystem vendor of e.g. the WLAN card doesn't match the chassis manufacturer, the drivers module flags a cross-OEM mismatch (Lenovo laptop with HP-vendored WLAN → SoftPaq must come from HP).

vendors.1043_note: ASUS also vendors many components in-house
